titleStmt.title: SII 8.185: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 185. (A.R. No. 589 of 1902). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu virumpa malarmakaḷ puṇara nilamakaḷ vaḷara Urimai yiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇan melkaṭal pāya tikkaṇaittu
n tan cakkara n(ā)ṭātti virasiṁ hāsanattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭai yāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirā jakesarivanma rāṉa cakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade- varkku yāṇṭu vatu
tiṉacin=tā maṇivaḷanāṭṭu kalāṟkkūṟṟattu kiḻkūṟṟu brahmade yam Aṉpil jalacayanattu paḷḷikoṇṭāḻvāṟkku Ivvūr peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhai yom Ittevarkku tiruviḻāppuṟamā(ā)ka viṭṭa nilam Ivvū m coḻanvāyttalaikku kiḻakkum tirunaḷḷāṟuuṭaiyān vāykkālukkut teṟkum ḷḷattukkum meṟkum kāverikkulaikku vaṭakku nānūṟṟuvamacakkal nilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvum
jalaśayana ttup paḷḷikoṇṭāḻvār koyilil ninṟum vaṭakku nokki poka karuṇākaraperunteruvukku meṟkum tirunaḷḷāṟuṭai yān vāykkālukku teṟkumkāverikulaikku vaṭakkuk kucanallanteruvukkuk kiḻakku cirāmamacakakkal nila mukakālum Āka nilam Ōṉṟe Eḻumāvum de vaṟkku vaṭa m tirunāḷ Eḻun taruḷa Innila Iṟaiyili viṭṭamaiyil Innilattil Ittiruviḻā
vukku Uṭalākak koṇṭu cakra vartti tirumeni kalliyāṇatirumeni Ākaveṇumenṟu tirukkoṭināḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvippān pāratāyan pa rameśva ran Ātittatevan tirumuḷaināḷ Eḻun=ta ruḷuvippān Āveṇi cirāman cen=ta n Āṇṭānāṉa cāvān=ti koṟṟanārāyaṇan munṟānāḷ Oloccan vāsude vaṉ kārimāṟan nālānāḷ pālāśri yan ceṭ ṇi Aiñcānāḷ Oloccan jātave- da n nārā
yaṇan Āṟānāḷ Āṇṭān nak(ka)kanārāyaṇan Ēḻānāḷ pāratāyan puruṣottamanaṅki Eṭṭānāḷ pāratāyan nārāyaṇaṉ nāraciṅkan Onpatānāḷ pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan caṅkaran Ippaṭi cey nāḻiyil śrīvaiyiṣṇa vaṉ Anniyāyappaṭṭum Ittiru nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ Anva yattārum can=ti rātittavaṟ Ubh Aiyamāka vi ttukkoḷḷappeṟuvārāka Ipparicu
Innāḷkaḷ Eḻun=ta ruḷuvikkakkaṭavomānom Ivvaṉaivom ....ivvūr tirunārāyaṇaviṇṇakar Āḻvār paṅkunit tiruvoṇam cakra vartti tirumeni kalliyāṇatirumeni yākaveṇumenṟu Aravi k koccayannāy niṟpār Eḻuntaruḷḷuviyyā llavaraiyan cūḷa tiruvāṇai puvanamuḻutuṭaiyār śrīpātam Ivvūr ṭṭantiruviti Akalam Onṟaraik koli
lum kucanallanteru Orukolu tirumaṭaipaḷḷi munṟaraikkolum perun=te ruvininṟum kāverikkulaikke Uṟavum Ivvūrin kiḻai kulottuṅkacoḻantiruviti Onṟaraikkolum tiruvālan tuṟaiuṭai
yār koyililninṟum vaṭakku nokki tiru vāykkāli luṟa Onṟarai kolum Itan meṟkku koṭātavācakan tiruviti patineṭṭunāṭan tiruvitikke Uṟa pokiṟa Erikiḻ kālum Āka Ittiruvitikaḷum teru
vukaḷum Iṟaivin=ta mel Ivaiyiṟṟukku Aḻivucevār tiruvāṇai puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā rāṇai nānūṟṟuvar rakṣai .. Ivvūr jalacayanattu paḷḷikoṇṭāḻvār koyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Irun tu sabhāvyavasthai cetu Uvāttukkalam viṭṭa nilamāvatu . Ivūr vāyttalai vāykkālukku meṟkku coḷen=ti raciṅka lukku teṟkku Itiṟ kuṟai Ikkoyil vaṭameṟkkoṭi
teṟkku Oloccan nārāyaṇan vāsude van nilam Itaṟku kiḻpāṟkellai vāykkālukku meṟku Oloccan cāttan kovintaṉ nilattukku vaṭakku tiruvaraṅkatevan nilattukku kiḻakku vāykkālukku teṟku Inaṭuppaṭṭa nilam nā
kālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭaṟutikku meṟku meṟppaṭiyān nilam mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam kha kālum Inilam Iṟaiyili ceytamaiyil Innilam Anupavittu Iraṇṭu pātamum Otuvikkakaṭavārākavum Inilam Uḻukuṭikaḷu
Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Iṟukkakaṭava nallātānāka Ipparicu Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Iḻutti Innilam Uvāttukalamāka viṭṭom Immahāsabhai yom In=ta Uvāttukkalam viṭuvitta Ivvūrkku ṭaittu vāykkālkaḷ keṭṭamaiyil koṭāta
ttu tiruvālan=tu ṟaiuṭaiyāṟkum Ippaḷḷikoṇṭāḻvāṟkkum tirunārāyaṇaviṇṇakarāḻvāṟkkum tiruviḻā Eḻuntaruḷuvikkakkaṭa(va)varākak kal veṭṭivittu tiruvitikaḷum tiruviti viḻāppuṟaṅkaḷum kaṇṭu kalveṭṭuvittum maṟṟum Ivvūṟku Aḻaku ku
ruppaḷḷittoṅkal Uṭaiyāril kuṇavāyil Uṭaiyān kotai Uyyavan=tā nāna Uttamacoḻa viḻupparaiyan Iv(va)naiyum Iva[ nanva] yattāraiyu mutukaṇṇā(ā)kak koṇṭu viṭṭom Ivvūr mahāsabh Aiyom . Itu nāṅThe continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 8.185 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
